name: My silicosis showed up years after drilling in Utah, can I still claim occupational illness?

mainEntity.name: My silicosis showed up years after drilling in Utah, can I still claim occupational illness?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, Utah covers delayed illnesses like silicosis if tied to work exposures.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, Utah allows claims for occupational illnesses like silicosis with multiple exposure dates, but analyze statutes carefully for timing.[1] Prove medical causation despite delay.[1] Key factors: Link to specific work exposures; no strict bar for latency; report within 180 days of awareness.[1] Gather old employment records and expert medical opinions now. File promptly and get legal advice to handle delayed-onset complexities.

description: Yes, Utah covers delayed illnesses like silicosis if tied to work exposures.[1]
